scripts.build: npm run build -w @clawcommand/shared && npm run build -w @clawcommand/parser && npm run build -w @clawcommand/scanner && npm run build -w @clawcommand/api
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build -w @clawcommand/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @clawcommand/parser && npm run test -w @clawcommand/api
scripts.quickstart: npm run setup && npm run scan
